summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sikkim Monastery Digital Experience platform after avatar ID fix. All core features working perfectly including the critical voice session functionality that was previously failing. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working seamlessly.

minor_issues.issue: ElevenLabs TTS not generating audio URLs in response
minor_issues.impact: Voice responses not playing audio, but text responses work correctly
minor_issues.workaround: Chat functionality works perfectly without audio, Anam voice mode provides voice interaction

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, about, gallery, travel tips sections
Header navigation with Discover, Galleries, Travel Guides links
Floating chatbot trigger button visible and clickable
Chatbot widget opens/closes properly with smooth animations
Chat and Voice tabs both functional and switch properly
Default greeting message from Tenzin displays correctly
User can type messages and receive AI responses from OpenRouter GPT-4o-mini
Voice tab shows avatar image and Start Voice Session button
Voice session initiation works - status changes from idle to Connected
Anam session token creation successful with valid avatar ID
Chat mode continues working after voice tab interaction
/api/anam/session-token creates session tokens successfully with fixed avatar ID
